creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
"Please note that 13.0 will be supported until three months from the 13.1 release date, which is yet to be scheduled at the time of this writing." (in 13.1 announcement)

Per https://www.freebsd.org/security/#sup, 13.1 release was May 16, 2022 and 13.0 EOL will be August 31, 2022.

(No time to submit a patch - I'm stretched too thin.)
